message: /gsd config is deprecated and will be removed. Use /gsd keys (manages both LLM and tool API keys).

GSD Tool Configuration

  ✓ Tavily Search
  ✗ Brave Search — get key at brave.com/search/api
  ✗ Context7 Docs — get key at context7.com/dashboard
  ✗ Jina Page Extract — get key at jina.ai/api
  ✗ Groq Voice — get key at console.groq.com

Quick task 1: toxの構文問題の修正に取り組む
Directory: .gsd/quick/1-tox
Branch: main

Usage: /gsd start <template> [description]

Templates:
  bugfix          Triage → fix → verify → ship
  small-feature   Scope → plan → implement → verify
  spike           Scope → research → synthesize
  hotfix          Fix → ship (minimal ceremony)
  refactor        Inventory → plan → migrate → verify
  security-audit  Scan → triage → remediate → re-scan
  dep-upgrade     Assess → upgrade → fix → verify
  full-project    Complete GSD with full ceremony

Examples:
  /gsd start bugfix fix login b…
→ /gsd status bugfix CIで失敗しているtoxの構文エラー修正
→ /gsd status bugfix CIで失敗しているtoxの構文エラー修正
